{{CargoRelic
|name=Carothers Nylon
|class_id=22416
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=02-05
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.03%)
|description=On Feb 5, 1928 AD, Carothers' team successfully synthesized nylon.<br>Carothers stumbled upon a white fiber with remarkable strength and elasticity while researching polymers in the residues from a previous experiment. He later led a team to produce it, resulting in the invention of nylon. This breakthrough material marked a major advance in the synthetic fiber industry and greatly impacted the textile industry.
|fame=45
|art=26
|fth=20
|civ=31
|tech=32
|ss1=Zombie Minion DEF +1%
|ss2=Zombie Minion DEF +2%
|ss3=Zombie Minion DEF +3%
|ss4=Zombie Minion DEF +5%
|ss7=Zombie Minion DEF +5%<br>Zombie Minion DEF +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Prairiesanctum skill I.png|50px]]Place in Prairie Sanctum: Prairie Sanctum, Glorium Output +5%
}}
